steps.title: Identify the two charges
steps.content: The telescope cost has a one-time down payment of $46$ dollars plus $p$ monthly payments of $21$ dollars each. The monthly payments total $21p$.

steps.title: Write the total
steps.content: The down payment plus the monthly payments equals the total cost. $$46+21p=214$$ $$21p+46=214$$ The answer is C.
